schemas.description: Identifies which schema(s) this resource uses. In this case it is the SCIM core User schema.

id.description: A server-assigned, unique identifier for this user.

location.description: Fully qualified URL of the resource.

userName.description: The unique username/login identifier. An email address in this case.

name.description: Structured object for the person’s name. This includes the family name (last name), and given name (first name).

formatted.description: The full name of the user, formatted for display according to cultural and locale conventions.

displayName.description: A human-readable name for the user, typically the full name.

userType.description: Free-form string to indicate the user license type in the organization.

active.description: Indicates whether the user is active or deactivated in the organization.

emails.description: An array of email addresses, each an object with a value, display and primary flag.

type.description: A label that identifies the type of email address.

primary.description: Indicates the user's primary email address. Only one item in the list should have primary set to true.

photos.description: An array for profile pictures, contains type.

groups.description: An array of groups (teams) the user belongs to in the organization. Contains id and display name of the team.

value.description: The unique ID of the group.

roles.description: An array of roles assigned to the user in the organization. Contains role type, value, display and primary flag.

type.description: The type of the role. Supported values are organization_user_role and organization_admin_role. Only one role should have type organization_user_role.

value.description:
The role assigned to the user.
For `organization_user_role` type, supported values include: ORGANIZATION_INTERNAL_ADMIN and ORGANIZATION_INTERNAL_USER.
For `organization_admin_role` type, supported values include: Content Admin, User Admin, Security Admin, or names of custom admin roles.

display.description: A human-readable name or description of the role.

primary.description: Indicates whether this role is the primary role. Only one role can be marked as primary.

preferredLanguage.description:
Specifies the users preferred language.

Example: en_US for English.

employeeNumber.description: Unique identifier for the user within the organization. Maximum length: 20 characters

costCenter.description: Cost center associated with the user. Maximum length: 120 characters

organization.description: Name of the organization to which the user belongs. Maximum length: 120 characters

division.description: The division to which the user belongs within the organization. Maximum length: 120 characters

department.description: The department to which the user belongs within the organization. Maximum length: 120 characters

displayName.description: The user's manager name. Maximum length: 60 characters

value.description: The "value" field has String type in SCIM standard but the managerId internal Miro field has Long type. If the "value" attribute is not a numeric value, we ignore the value.
